name: optuna_studies_migration_fixtures
description: SQLite fixture DBs for O3 archive migration tests. Provenance: schema-derived from a live Optuna RDB storage DB (introspected via optuna.create_study + PRAGMA table_info on 2026-05-15). The 'studies' table schema (study_id INTEGER PK, study_name VARCHAR(512)) is the Optuna 3.x internal schema for study naming. Fixture DBs are minimal: three pre-existing studies using the old normalized_name-only scheme, no trial data, no LEGACY__ prefix.

legacy_studies_before_archive.sqlite.description: Three studies with bare normalized_name values (no timestamp prefix, no LEGACY__ prefix). Simulates an optuna_studies.db before migrations/optuna_001_archive_accumulated_studies.sql is applied.

legacy_studies_after_archive.sqlite.description: Same three studies after the archive migration renames them with LEGACY__ prefix. Expected post-migration state for test_archive_migration_is_rename_only.

schema_source: Optuna 3.x RDB storage — introspected 2026-05-15 via optuna.create_study(storage='sqlite:///...') + PRAGMA table_info(studies)
tables_omitted_rationale: trial_params, trial_values, trial_intermediate_values, etc. omitted — O3 migration only touches the studies table; no trial data is needed for the migration tests.
